LAW AND MOTION 302, NOV-13-2024 RE: MOTION TO VOLUNTARILY DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S PAGA CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE. Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Voluntarily Dismiss Plaintiff'S Paga Claims Without Prejudice And Individual Claims With Prejudice
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF IRVING GARCIA'S, ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND ALL AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES Notice Of Motion And Motion To Voluntarily Dismiss Plaintiff'S Paga Claims Without Prejudice And Individual Claims With Prejudice.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to voluntarily dismiss plaintiff's PAGA claims without prejudice and individual claims with prejudice" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Musto. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
